user.title: NoLongerEvil Nest Setup
user.description: Enter your NoLongerEvil API key from https://nolongerevil.com/settings → API Keys

data.base_url: Server URL (leave default for hosted service)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key or insufficient permissions. Ensure the key has read+write scopes.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the NoLongerEvil server. Check the URL and your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.
